blueprint/ux-quiet-clarity-redesign.md#Conceptual redesign strategy / C1. Bounded degraded and frozen calm states
cases.summary: The approved release tuple, watch tuple, browser channel, and both required trust slices stay exact and current.
cases.title: Exact tuple with trusted slices keeps calm truth and mutation live.

validators.detail: The active release freeze still matches the reviewed package hash and current watchlist hash.
All required slices remain trusted and the browser channel stays in monitoring posture only.

sourceRefs: blueprint/platform-frontend-blueprint.md#Action dispatch, acknowledgement, projection follow-through, and route-local settlement
blueprint/ux-quiet-clarity-redesign.md#Conceptual redesign strategy / C1. Bounded degraded and frozen calm states
cases.summary: One required operational slice remains partial, so the board can explain and observe but not imply calm or arm live controls.
cases.title: Partial trust evidence keeps the surface diagnostic only.

validators.detail: The degraded slice stays below the trusted floor while remaining diagnostically visible.
The verdict suppresses calm language and writable posture outside the live state.

sourceRefs: blueprint/platform-frontend-blueprint.md#Action dispatch, acknowledgement, projection follow-through, and route-local settlement
blueprint/ux-quiet-clarity-redesign.md#Conceptual redesign strategy / C1. Bounded degraded and frozen calm states
cases.summary: The release tuple is still exact, but the active channel freeze makes governed rollback posture the only legal authority.
cases.title: Rollback-recommended channel freeze forces governed recovery only.

validators.detail: An active rollback recommendation prevents live mutation despite exact parity and trusted slices.
The verdict preserves one explicit recovery disposition instead of falling back to detached error posture.

sourceRefs: blueprint/platform-frontend-blueprint.md#Action dispatch, acknowledgement, projection follow-through, and route-local settlement
blueprint/ux-quiet-clarity-redesign.md#Conceptual redesign strategy / C1. Bounded degraded and frozen calm states
cases.summary: The simulator withholds the watch tuple and publication parity, and one slice has not completed a policy-legal evaluation pass.
cases.title: Missing watch and publication inputs fail closed to blocked.

validators.detail: Absent watch-tuple and publication inputs stop verdict generation from degrading into guesswork.
The blocked verdict suppresses both calm truth and governed recovery because no bounded recovery path is published.

sourceRefs: blueprint/platform-frontend-blueprint.md#Action dispatch, acknowledgement, projection follow-through, and route-local settlement
blueprint/ux-quiet-clarity-redesign.md#Conceptual redesign strategy / C1. Bounded degraded and frozen calm states
cases.summary: The freeze tuple stays immutable, but the linked standards watchlist has drifted stale and reopens the approval block.
cases.title: Standards watchlist drift supersedes an otherwise valid freeze.

validators.detail: The stale watchlist supersedes the freeze even though publication and trust rows still look green in isolation.
The simulator refuses to reconstruct live writability from fragments once the verdict exists.

sourceRefs: blueprint/platform-frontend-blueprint.md#Action dispatch, acknowledgement, projection follow-through, and route-local settlement
blueprint/ux-quiet-clarity-redesign.md#Conceptual redesign strategy / C1. Bounded degraded and frozen calm states
cases.summary: The frozen tuple is still present, but parity drift and blocked provenance force a governed recovery path instead of calm success or write access.
cases.title: Parity or provenance drift suppresses calm truth and writable posture.

validators.detail: Publication or provenance drift suppresses calm truth even when the required slices remain trusted.
The verdict keeps one governed recovery route visible instead of silently blocking the same shell.
